holdings.role: Memory/HBM cycle exposure; no additional discretionary chase outside scheduled tranches
AI infrastructure exposure; hold unless specific kill-news trigger fires
Live memory ETF substitute; use instead of SNDK
AI accelerator/platform exposure; hold, no new adds in v3
Defensive residual sleeve and catastrophe-gate destination

strategy_notes: Taxable v3 default: buy/hold target basket; no scheduled sell-to-rebalance.
Deployment: three daylight tranches on 2026-07-06, 2026-07-09, 2026-07-14 unless explicitly overridden.
Default tranche split when holdings are near the handoff snapshot: GEV 46%, GLD 31%, VRT 23%.
No night trades. No new NVDA, SNDK, AMD, or SMCI. SMCI wash-sale window remains closed until 2026-08-02.
Month-end catastrophe gate only: if the ex-GLD equity sleeve closes more than 15% below its trailing 252-trading-day high, move stock basket to GLD.
NBIS same-day sell exception exists only for prewritten kill-news, not ordinary price weakness.
